claim: Instruction tuning (like Instruct GPT) revolutionized LLM usability; image models now achieving comparable instruction-following quality with improved text rendering
actionable: Use instruction-focused image prompts; expect better text rendering and directive following compared to prior text-to-image models
source_title: Creating Mind Maps with OpenAI's Image Generation

claim: In-context learning for image generation: provide visual examples of desired style/format and model learns to generate in similar aesthetics
actionable: Include reference images in image generation prompts; use in-context learning instead of relying only on text description
source_title: Creating Mind Maps with OpenAI's Image Generation

claim: Multi-turn generation allows iterative refinement; specifying 'generate N examples and pick best' improves output quality versus single generation
actionable: Use sampling multiple completions for important images; refine iteratively through multiple turns rather than optimizing single prompt
source_title: Creating Mind Maps with OpenAI's Image Generation

claim: Character consistency in image generation enables maintaining visual identity across multiple image generations, unlocking narrative and sequential use cases
actionable: Use character consistency for multi-scene projects; define characters once and reuse across generations for coherent visual stories
source_title: Creating Mind Maps with OpenAI's Image Generation

claim: Image models may be using prompt rewriting internally; system prompt may direct model to interpret directives more effectively than raw input
actionable: Assume image models rewrite prompts internally; write prompts as natural language directives rather than attempting low-level control
source_title: Creating Mind Maps with OpenAI's Image Generation
